ModMetaData.name: LxO - Smart Gear
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Intelligent automatic equipment management. Pawns equip the right weapon, wear the right clothes, and carry the right supplies -- based on their role, current job, weather, and combat status.
Zero configuration needed. Works out of the box. Every pawn auto-detects their role from skills and traits.
Drafted? Combat gear. Hunting? Hunting rifle. Cold snap? Parka. Doctor? Carries medicine. Melee attacker in your face? Draws sidearm knife.
Compatible with most mods. Safe to add mid-save.
